title: thlaspi alpestre subsp. sylvium
intro: Thlaspi alpestre subsp. sylvium is a plant species also known as mountain cress or alpine pepperwort, which belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thlaspi alpestre subsp. sylvium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
